title: Olivia Bloomfield - Government Whip, House of Lords - ACOBA Advice
body: "Baroness Bloomfield left her role at the House of Lords in May 2023  Consultant, Titanvolt Limited  Baroness Bloomfield sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Titanvolt Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Advisory Board Member, Gresham House Asset Management Limited  Baroness Bloomfield sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Gresham House Asset Management Limited. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2024; and the appointment was taken up in January 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Independent Contractor/ Consultant, Terrestrial Energy Inc  Baroness Bloomfield sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Terrestrial Energy Inc. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2023; and the appointment was subsequently taken up. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
